blocked_by_future_matches.jpn_j1_2026_27: 2026 special transition data cannot be pooled into the 2026/27 target season; formal deployment must wait for verified completed 2026/27 matches and the normal sample gate.

blocked_by_missing_evidence: Historical synchronized market records are unavailable and are not used for question-time prices.
Historical point-in-time lineup and injury records are unavailable.
No competition has a signed V4.6.0 A-grade receipt.
Stage calibration remains disabled where source stages are unresolved.
UCL cross-league comparison requires a current market anchor.

J1 2026 special transition results are available from the official J.League data site and are stored as a separate domain; they must not be pooled into 2026/27 target-season team strength. 2026/27 formal deployment requires verified completed target-season matches and the normal sample gate.
policy: Engineering tasks that can be completed with current frozen assets are executed. Future-season match gates and missing timestamped historical market/lineup evidence remain fail-closed. No research result is promoted automatically and CURRENT remains the sole formal rule authority.
